notes:
{"notes":"

What's new

  • New input modes — type / for commands or @ for spaces with smooth animated icon transitions.
  • Space indexing progress shown inline in the command list — queued, listing, or percentage.
  • Theme picker now shows color swatches for each theme to preview the vibe at a glance.
  • Automatic full reindex when indexing engine is updated — no manual action needed.
  • Proper macOS menu bar tray icon that adapts to light and dark mode.
  • Command-specific icons in the command list for better visual clarity.
  • Fixed race condition where newly created spaces wouldn't show as queued for indexing.
  • Migrated space persistence to JSON for better forward compatibility.

Thank you for the continued support and feedback!

"}
